sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: The Home Depot, Inc. stock (US4370761029): Is its pro customer shift strong enough to unlock new ups
feed.summary: Home Depot's increased focus on professional contractors is a strategic move to ensure stability and growth amidst a cooling housing market. feed.title: HP Inc stock (US40434L1052): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive news about HP Inc. stock, shifting to personalized mobile feeds that proactively deliver insights. This change, which completed on February 27, 2026, focuses on behavioral data to curate content relevant to investors tracking HP's personal systems and printing segments. For retail and institutional investors, this means faster, more contextual updates on market share, AI PC trends, supply chain dynamics, and HP's strategic moves, appearing directly in their Google app without active searching.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. stock (US8725901040): Is its post-merger network edge strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (US8725901040) is positioned as America's largest wireless carrier by subscribers, leveraging its leading 5G network from the Sprint merger. The company prioritizes customer growth and innovation, offering no-contract plans and aggressive 5G expansion. Analysts generally view T-Mobile favorably due to its strong subscriber momentum, network leadership, and potential for sustained earnings growth despite competitive and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Gannett Co Inc stock (US36472T1097): Why digital transformation matters more now
feed.summary: Gannett Co Inc, a major U.S. media company, is navigating a challenging shift from print to digital, owning USA TODAY and hundreds of local publications. The company's strategy involves accelerating digital revenue, boosting subscriptions, and leveraging its local market penetration while managing debt and competition. Success hinges on effective execution of its digital transformation initiatives to reward long-term investors.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. stock (US89417E1091): Is its property-casualty resilience the real test for investors now?
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (US89417E1091) stands out for its disciplined approach to property and casualty insurance, making it an appealing option for investors seeking stability in uncertain economic times. The company's focus on profitability over aggressive growth, strong underwriting, and diversified business segments contribute to its resilience and consistent returns. With a history of dividend increases and strategic investments in technology, Travelers is positioned as a defensive play for investors aiming to build recession-resilient portfolios.

feed.title: ONEOK: Midstream's Best Risk-Adjusted Value Play
feed.summary: ONEOK (OKE) is presented as a strong investment in the midstream sector, trading at a discount despite significant EBITDA growth. The company has successfully integrated the Magellan acquisition, exceeding synergy targets, and has a substantial growth backlog expected to drive free cash flow by 2027. Despite conservative 2026 guidance, the article suggests OKE offers compelling risk-adjusted value with a nearly 5% dividend yield and significant upside potential.

feed.title: Costco at $1,000: Still a Buy or Time to Wait?
feed.summary: The article analyzes whether Costco stock, currently trading at an all-time high of around $1,000, is still a beneficial investment. While acknowledging Costco's excellent business model, strong balance sheet, and operational efficiency, the author concludes that its current valuation at a 50x forward P/E multiple makes it too expensive for new investors. The recommendation is a "Hold" for existing shareholders, but for new capital, a wait for a more attractive entry point is advised due to the stock being priced for perfection.

feed.title: NextEra Energy Inc stock (US65339F1012): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive news about NextEra Energy Inc. (NEE), shifting from traditional search to personalized mobile feeds. This change provides faster access to updates on the company's clean energy projects, renewable growth, and regulated utility performance, directly impacting how retail investors and market watchers track this leading renewable power giant. feed.title: The Boeing Company stock (US0970231058): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive news about The Boeing Company (BA), delivering personalized aerospace and commercial aviation insights directly to mobile feeds without a search.
